message:
feat(fcp-mesh): lease authority view, singleton writer election, and fencing token diff tracking

node.rs: New authority module with AuthorityView and
ObservedLeaseAuthority types.  MeshNode gains
observed_lease_authorities(), eligible_authority_nodes(), and
preferred_singleton_holder() — implements deterministic singleton
writer election based on fencing token ordering with tiebreak on
expiry and node ID.

Lease diff tracking now compares both expires_at and fencing_token
(previously only expires_at), detecting token rotations that don't
change the expiry.

planner.rs: LeasePurpose::SingletonWriter variant and related
planner context updates.

lib.rs: Export new authority module.

Integration and no-mock tests updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
